hero.headline:
Explore the Universe,
One Scale at a Time
hero.subheadline: An interactive 3D journey through the solar system, stellar neighborhood, and the observable universe.

features.title: Everything in One Place
features.subtitle: Four scales of cosmic exploration, rendered in real-time 3D.

items.title: Solar System
items.desc: Navigate all 8 planets, dwarf planets, and their moons in a real-time orbital simulation.

items.title: Stellar Neighborhood
items.desc: Zoom out to 100 light-years and discover thousands of nearby stars with detailed spectral data.

items.title: The Milky Way
items.desc: Pull back further to see our galaxy — 200 billion stars spanning 100,000 light-years.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps from signup to the edge of the observable universe.

steps.title: Create an Account
steps.desc: Sign up for free and save your exploration progress, bookmarks, and achievements across sessions.

steps.title: Launch the Explorer
steps.desc: Enter the interactive 3D scene. Click any planet, star, or constellation to reveal detailed scientific data.

steps.title: Discover & Learn
steps.desc: Scale from the solar system to the observable universe. Earn XP and unlock achievements as you explore.

quote.text: The cosmos is within us. We are made of star-stuff. We are a way for the universe to know itself.
quote.author: Carl Sagan

cta.headline: Begin Your Journey Through the Cosmos
cta.subheadline: Free to explore. No telescope required.
